<!-- indicator: tbl-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: tbl-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate
#| tbl-cap: 'Falls Hospitalization, Rate per 10,000 Population 65 Years and Older by Race and Ethnicity, 2020–2022'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_table_object
render_table_object(object_id="tbl-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
from IPython.display import Markdown, display
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_source_callout_for_object
display(Markdown(render_source_callout_for_object("tbl-65-falls-hospital-rande-rate", CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH)))
```
